positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring silhouetted stylized fauna and flora. The main subjects are a family of forest animals (deer, fox, squirrel) interacting peacefully within a stylized grove of trees and ferns. Emphasize deep contrast, using solid black silhouettes against a vibrant gradient background of deep sapphire blue blending into warm teal. The composition should be centrally focused, allowing for negative space for text or design elements. Use a clean, graphic illustration style, reminiscent of modern nature prints. Ideal for t-shirt printing, vectors, and clean lines. Flat graphic art, symmetrical balance, highly detailed edges, digital painting.
negative: blurry, out of focus, noisy, realistic, photograph, text, watermark, logos, words, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, monochrome, sketch
